stemHtml: In an aircraft with conventional flying controls, with the autopilot and auto-trim in operation, what will happen if the pilot manually operates the pitch trim?

options.a: The trim system will respond, but then the autopilot will re-trim the aircraft.
options.b: The autopilot will continue to fly the aircraft, but it may be out of trim when the pilot disconnects.
options.c: Nothing. Manual trim is inhibited with the autopilot engaged.
